name: marketing-campaign-team
description: Marketing campaign team with content creator, campaign planner, SEO expert, and competitive analyst for full-spectrum marketing operations

displayDescription.en: A team of 4 marketing specialists led by a Marketing Director: Content Creator (blog posts/email/social media/brand voice), Campaign Planner (campaign strategy/audience/channels/budget), SEO Expert (technical audit/content optimization/performance analytics), and Brand Analyst (competitive positioning/brand review). Covers the full marketing lifecycle.
displayDescription.zh: 由营销总监领导的 4 人营销专家团队：内容创作者（博客/邮件/社媒/品牌声音）、活动策划师（战役策略/受众/渠道/预算）、SEO 专家（技术审计/内容优化/效果分析）和品牌分析师（竞品定位/品牌审核）。覆盖完整营销生命周期。

defaultInitPrompt.en: Plan a marketing campaign / Draft content for our product launch / Audit our SEO
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 策划一场营销战役 / 为产品发布起草内容 / 审计我们的 SEO
